name: edit_file
description:
Edit an existing plain-text file or create a new plain-text file within registered source directories. Paths may be absolute or relative to a source root. Supports exact string replacement and plain-text file creation.

Use this tool when:
- You need to modify an existing text file (use str_replace with the exact text to find and its replacement)
- You need to create a new text file (use create with the file content)

Do not use this tool for DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/PDF files. Use run_shell + doc-script-editor (Python Office libraries) for Office/PDF create/edit/validate/convert/render/recalc/unpack workflows.

For str_replace: old_str must match exactly once in the file. Include enough surrounding context to make it unique, or pass start_line/end_line to narrow the replacement. Common aliases are accepted: action 'replace' means 'str_replace', old_string means old_str, and new_string/content mean new_str. If action is omitted, the tool infers str_replace when old_str/old_string is present, otherwise create.

path.description: Path to the file (absolute or relative to a source directory)

action.description: Edit action: 'str_replace' to find-and-replace text in an existing file, 'replace' as a convenient alias, or 'create' to create a new file. Optional when the operation is clear from the supplied fields.

old_str.description: For str_replace: exact string to find in the file (must match exactly once)

new_str.description: For str_replace: replacement string. For create: file content

content.description: Alias for new_str, especially for create

start_line.description: Optional 1-based inclusive start line limiting where old_str is searched. Useful when old_str appears multiple times.

end_line.description: Optional 1-based inclusive end line limiting where old_str is searched. Useful when old_str appears multiple times.
